name: ledgerline
description: Agent-native composition, expressive notation, multi-engine virtual instruments, production mixing, analysis, and reversible review.

interface.shortDescription: Compose, perform, render, mix, and revise music
interface.longDescription: LedgerLine gives Codex a strict authored score language, semantic instrument expression, SoundFont/SFZ/external VST3 and CLAP rendering, bus mixing, time-local analysis, licensed asset lineage, snapshots, and reviewable MusicXML/MIDI/audio outputs.
defaultPrompt: Ask me for a musical direction, then compose a playable LedgerLine piece.
Orchestrate my sketch and render a reviewable audio draft.
A/B this render, annotate audible issues, and revise only the approved scope.
